ignoreCommand: LAST=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B); echo "$LAST" | grep -qE '(\[skip ci\]|chore\(monitor\)|chore\(rotation\)|chore\(strategy\)|chore\(sprint\)|auto-refresh|cycle [0-9]+ slot|aiso-taaft-gaps|new blog posts?|^content:|^docs:|^memory:|^security:)' && exit 0; git diff --name-only HEAD^ HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^(src/|app/|components/|lib/|data/|public/|supabase/migrations/|package(-lock)?\.json|next\.config|tsconfig|tailwind|vercel\.json|eslint\.config|postcss\.config)' && exit 1; exit 0
